cycle_1.determinism-auditor: PASS — check_doc_generated_facts is purely deterministic (filesystem + regex + arithmetic), no inference (ADR-003).
cycle_1.historian: BLOCKING — commands.md:219 had a stale '(core 6)' missed by the first fix, and the detector's 'all N core agents' regex did not catch the parenthetical form (false PASS).
cycle_1.edge-case-hunter: CONDITIONAL — ADR-template name-denylist fragile (collision/rename); skip-on-no-match; tier regex first-match; substring agent-name match; file-handle/try-except hygiene.
cycle_1.simplicity-enforcer: CONDITIONAL — ADR-template heuristic fragile (same); _NUMBER_WORDS / tier-count / agent-naming weighed; reusable-mechanism concern self-downgraded (modelled on hardcoded skill-meta check).

fixes: Fixed commands.md:219 '(core 6)' -> '(core 7)' and added a '\(core (\d+)\)' detector pattern; _check_number now uses finditer so every stated form is verified.
Replaced the ADR-template name-denylist with fence-aware counting (_count_command_behaviours): counts ## outside code fences, robust to renamed/added example headings and name collisions.
Anchored the tier regex to the summary sentence ((\w+) tiers[^\n]*drop in) so 'Changing tiers' cannot false-match.
Whole-word agent-name match; file reads use with-statements; commands.md read wrapped in try/except.
Detector also guards agents.md (it states the core-agent count).
Added tests: tier-count failure, fence-excluded headings.

cycle_2.historian: PASS — commands.md:219 fixed; no other stale counts; all sources agree (7 agents, 18 behaviours); ADR-016 annotation correct; agents.md now guarded.
cycle_2.edge-case-hunter: CONDITIONAL — 3 prior SIGNIFICANT resolved; 3 new MINOR latent (tilde fences, indented fences, skip-on-no-match). Fence MINORs fixed (CommonMark indent<=3 + ```/~~~).

accepted_minor: _check_number skips when a doc states no count (no claim to verify) — documented inline; the agent-name completeness check covers the agent set. Accepted design choice.
_NUMBER_WORDS covers 0-12; agent/tier counts are far below that today.
verdict: RESOLVED — zero BLOCKING after 2 cycles; cycle-1 BLOCKING (missed (core 6) + detector gap) and the denylist fragility fixed; residual items MINOR/accepted.
